summary: Curing Video dialog visibility fix verified. The fix (max-h-[85vh] overflow-y-auto added to DialogContent) successfully ensures all dialog elements are visible and accessible within the viewport.
test_credentials: Site Engineer: engineer@constructionos.com (via Demo Access button)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dialog visibility fix verified. The max-h-[85vh] overflow-y-auto CSS classes added to DialogContent component ensure dialogs don't exceed viewport height and are scrollable if needed.

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Curing Video dialog was cut off at the bottom - toggle switch and Save/Cancel buttons were not visible
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Added max-h-[85vh] overflow-y-auto to base DialogContent component in dialog.jsx line 32
